title: Brain Nutrition After 40: What to Eat for Memory, Focus, and Mental Clarity
seo_title: Brain Nutrition After 40: What to Eat for Memory and Focus
meta_description: Discover the top foods for memory and focus after 40, what to avoid for brain health, and how to build a brain-supporting daily menu as estrogen shifts.
tags: brain nutrition, memory, focus, mental clarity, women over 40, omega-3, neuro creamer, diet
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: After 40, estrogen withdrawal increases oxidative stress in the brain, raising the need for antioxidant and anti-inflammatory foods. This guide covers the top brain foods, what to avoid, and a practical daily menu for memory and mental clarity.
